claims.text: Scaling up language models greatly improves task-agnostic, few-shot performance, sometimes even competitive with prior state-of-the-art fine-tuning approaches.
claims.source_text: We train GPT-3, an autoregressive language model with 175 billion parameters

methods.name: In-context few-shot learning
methods.source_text: the model is given a few demonstrations of the task at inference time as conditioning

relations.explanation: Autoregressive Transformer LM scaled to 175B parameters.

evidence.text: We use the same model and architecture as GPT-2

relations.explanation: Shows strong few-shot performance without task-specific fine-tuning required by BERT-style models.

evidence.text: GPT-3 achieves strong performance on many NLP datasets, including translation, question-answering, and cloze tasks
